name: Crumb-Topped Jam Coffeecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Slivered almonds, or chopped blanched almonds
1/2 cup Unsalted butter; 1 stick chilled and cut in 8 pieces
1 cup Orange marmalade, or raspberry jam
recipeInstructions:
Make the topping:
1. Place all ingredients in a food processor and pulse until the mixture forms curds and holds together when pressed between your fingers. Leave in processor until needed.
Make the cake:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Butter and flour a 9 x 12 inch baking pan.
3. Whisk together flour, baking soda, and baking powder; set aside.
4. Cream butter and sugar with an electric mixer on medium speed.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating for a minute after each addition.
6. Mix in marmalade or jam on low speed.
7. Mix in half the flour mixture on low speed and beat until incorporated.
8. Add buttermilk and mix.
9. Add remaining flour and beat until smooth.
10. Spread batter in pan using a spatula for an even layer.
11. Sprinkle topping over cake and gently pat with fingertips.
12. Bake 40 to 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean and the cake pulls away from the sides of the pan.
13. Let cool in pan on rack for 20 to 30 minutes before serving, or until reaches room temperature.
